title: fischer DuoPower 8 x 65, powerful universal plug with intelligent 2-component technology for fastenings in concrete, bricks, stone, etc., 50 plugs without screws
features: Highest load transfer & intelligent function: The DuoPower is the first plug that adjusts itself automatically to the respective substrate, transfers the highest loads through the three product functions of folding, expanding and knotting and thus enables a wide range of applications in solid, perforated and panel building materials. The supplied screws are perfectly machted to the plugs

All-in-one solution for all building materials: Used with screws Ø 4.5 - 6 mm, the intelligent 2-component plug ensures top load values – the grey component automatically activates the optimal operating principle depending on the respective building material, while the expansion wings of the red component support safe spreading

Absolutely powerful: When installing the plug, the narrow plug rim stops it from slipping into the borehole while the anti-rotation feature prevents rotation into the drillhole, and the feel-good factor exactly indicates when the plug is installed perfectly

Areas of application: The powerful plug is suitable for attaching light wall shelves, mirror cabinets, curtain rails, hanging baskets, electronic devices or wall clocks in various building materials such as concrete, lightweight concrete, solid and perforated bricks, natural stone, solid sand-lime bricks and perforated sand-lime bricks
Scope of delivery: 50 x DuoPower 8 x 65 by fischer, item no. 538251
description: From the manufacturer fischer Group of Companies fischer, the specialist for safe, economical, and innovative fixing and connecting elements for the construction and DIY industry has become one of the market leaders in fastening technology. The spectrum of products consists of 15.000 proprietary articles as well as various customer-specific solutions and ranges from chemical applications to steel anchors and plastic plugs. fischer DuoPower The plug that adjusts itself through folding, expanding and knotting The DuoPower is a self-activating 2-component plug. It has three product functions that it can use automatically depending on the building material: expanding, folding and knotting. This makes it an intelligent universal plug for fixings in building materials of all kinds. Due to its diverse use and its high holding values, it convinces both professionals and do-it-yourselfers all over the world. Universal plug for all building materials Intelligent, self-activating functions Serrated anti-rotation feature and highest load values Easy attachment and fastening of the screw with feedback for a perfect fit Long versions suitable for problematic substrates fischer DuoPower – Examples of application: Intelligent universal plug Whether folding, expanding or knotting, with its intelligent operating principle, the fischer DuoPower automatically adjusts itself to the building material and transfers the highest load values. Thanks to the great feedback (feel-good factor) when installing the screw, it becomes noticeable when the plug is installed perfectly. This creates an additional plus in safety and makes working much easier. Features & Benefits The plug has two material components. Depending on the building material, the grey part made of high-quality nylon automatically activates the optimal operating principle for the best grip, while the expansion wings of the red component support safe spreading. The anti-rotation feature and the narrow plug rim avoid rotation and prevent the screw from slipping into the drill hole. Areas of application The DuoPower is suitable for use in numerous building materials such as concrete, solid and sand-lime bricks, natural stone, vertically perforated brick and perforated sand-lime brick, plasterboard, gypsum construction and fibreboard, hollow blocks and chipboard. Ideal for attaching TV consoles, wall cabinets, window blinds, mailboxes, lights, bathroom facilities, range hoods and much more. Intelligent self-activating functions depending on the substrate: Expands in solid building materials Safely expands in solid building materials such as concrete or bricks. Folds in perforated building materials Safely folds in perforated building materials and offers additional safety. Knots in prefabricated building materials Safely knots in prefabricated building materials such as double-planked plasterboard.
